name: Aura
tagline: The mathematics of your perfect wardrobe.
description: An AI stylist that decodes your biological color season and body geometry to build a wardrobe that is undeniably, effortlessly yours.

brand.visualMood: A high-end editorial fashion magazine meets a minimalist architect's studio. Deep charcoals, alabaster whites, sharp typography, and deliberate, museum-like white space.
voiceAttributes: speaks like a high-end personal stylist
uses exact, descriptive terminology (e.g., 'cool olive undertones', 'structured draping')
references: The clean math of Dieter Rams' design

framework.name: Nuxt 4
framework.why: Server-side rendering for speed, combined with a highly app-like client experience for the daily styling flows.

database.name: Supabase (PostgreSQL)
database.why: Relational data is critical here (Users -> Profiles -> Wardrobes -> Outfits). Vector support for semantic clothing search.

auth.name: Clerk
auth.why: Frictionless onboarding, handles secure storage of user profile data.

ai_vision.name: OpenAI GPT-4o Vision API
ai_vision.why: To analyze user onboarding photos for skin undertones and structural body mapping, and to tag uploaded clothing images.

hosting.name: Vercel
hosting.why: Edge caching for fast image delivery and seamless deployments.

storage.name: Cloudinary
storage.why: On-the-fly image transformations, background removal for wardrobe uploads, and precise color-profile delivery.
